details.test: Task 1 - Follow up to 3 painters and verify Following list
Task 2 - Pledge to cheapest $10–$20 tier for Chicago music campaign
Task 3 - Create public appreciation post with 2 tagged artists and #Inspiration
Task 4 - Create "Short Performances" collection with short video performances
Task 5 - RSVP to soonest multi-artist live-stream in next 14 days
Task 6 - Send 3 appreciation messages to painter, musician, photographer
Task 7 - Join 30-Day challenge and complete Day 1 with shared update
Task 8 - Save < $25 Thank-you video campaign and set 3-day reminder
Task 9 - Like #BehindTheScenes posts and comment on the most recent
